grant_sections.name: project_abstract
grant_sections.title: Project Abstract
grant_sections.generation_instructions: Provide a concise overview of the proposed research project, including its goals, methodology, and expected outcomes. Include a general audience abstract and a technical abstract (2,000 characters max each).

grant_sections.name: research_plan
grant_sections.title: Research Plan
grant_sections.generation_instructions: Detail the proposed research methodology, experimental design, and data analysis plan. Include background, specific aims, preliminary data (if any), statistical plan, figures, and rationale/fit with key criteria including clinical impact.

grant_sections.name: clinical_relevance
grant_sections.title: Clinical Relevance and Impact
grant_sections.generation_instructions: Describe the potential clinical impact of the proposed research and its relevance to improving patient outcomes. Highlight how the research will be translated into new treatments or diagnostic tools for melanoma. Include fit with MRA portfolio (2000 characters max)

grant_sections.name: novelty_and_innovation
grant_sections.title: Novelty and Innovation
grant_sections.generation_instructions: Describe the novelty and innovative aspects of the proposed research. Explain how the project will advance the current understanding of melanoma and how the approach differs from prior research.

grant_sections.name: milestones_and_timeline
grant_sections.title: Milestones and Timeline
grant_sections.generation_instructions: Provide a detailed project timeline with specific milestones and deliverables. Include timelines for IRB and regulatory approvals (if applicable), patient accrual, and analysis completion (5 pages max for clinical trials).

grant_sections.name: data_management_plan
grant_sections.title: Data Management Plan
grant_sections.generation_instructions: Describe the plan for data sharing, curation, and public availability in compliance with MRA's guidelines. Address how data will be stored, accessed, and made available for independent verification, including publication in open-access journals and deposition in PubMed Central within 12 months of publication. Outline use of CC BY-NC license for all outputs.

grant_sections.name: team_qualifications
grant_sections.title: Team Qualifications and Expertise
grant_sections.generation_instructions: Describe the qualifications and expertise of the Principal Investigator and all Key Personnel. Detail the mentorship plan for Young Investigators, including the Mentor's role, support, and guidance. Provide the ORCID ID for all PIs, Young Investigators, and Mentors. For Team Science proposals, justify the roles of each team member and their contributions.

grant_sections.name: research_environment
grant_sections.title: Research Environment and Resources
grant_sections.generation_instructions: Describe the research environment, available resources, and institutional support for the proposed research. Include access to facilities, equipment, and any unique resources. For Dermatology Career Development Awards, describe the Dermatology Department/Division research environment.

grant_sections.name: budget_justification
grant_sections.title: Budget Justification
grant_sections.generation_instructions: Provide a detailed budget justification, explaining all requested costs including personnel, fringe benefits, data sharing compliance, and other costs. For Academic-Industry Partnerships, clarify contributions from both MRA and the industry partner. If needed, upload the justification as a document.

grant_sections.name: current_and_pending_support
grant_sections.title: Current and Pending Support
grant_sections.generation_instructions: List all current and pending support for the applicant. For Team Science applications, include current and pending support for all Principal Investigators and Young Investigators. Describe and explain any overlap with the MRA proposal.

grant_sections.name: biosketches
grant_sections.title: Biosketches
grant_sections.generation_instructions: Upload NIH-format biosketches for the applicant and all Key Personnel. Include publications, datasets, code, patents, and papers posted to preprint servers.

grant_sections.name: letters_of_support
grant_sections.title: Letters of Support
grant_sections.generation_instructions: Include letters of support from Mentors and the industry partner (if applicable). Mentor letters must confirm an independent research program, mentor's role, mentoring plan, research environment, and institutional support. Industry partner letters should confirm the amount of support and commitment to execute agreements with the awardee institution and MRA.

grant_sections.name: eligibility_checklist
grant_sections.title: Applicant Eligibility Checklist
grant_sections.generation_instructions: Upload the Applicant Eligibility Checklist signed by the Department Chair, Division Head, or Dean. This confirms that the applicant meets all eligibility requirements.

grant_sections.name: clinical_trial_protocol
grant_sections.title: Clinical Trial Protocol Synopsis
grant_sections.generation_instructions: For proposals involving clinical trials, attach a brief protocol synopsis (5 pages max) with timeline and milestones, including IRB approval, patient accrual, and analysis completion.
